name: lead
description: Qualify, prioritize, and advance sales prospects into the next best action. Best used after engagement begins.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.lead_qualification: Assess lead quality based on fit, intent, urgency, and authority
capabilities.gap_identification: Identify missing information needed for sound judgment
capabilities.action_recommendation: Recommend pursue, qualify further, nurture, or deprioritize with reasoning
capabilities.follow_up_drafting: Generate contextual follow-up messages with a genuine reason to exist

audience: Sales reps and SDRs qualifying inbound or outbound leads
Revenue teams improving lead judgment and follow-up discipline
